original_image_tags: A worn, brown manila file folder. The folder contains multiple labels, stamps, and handwritten notations.

elements.description: A brown manila file folder cover featuring two white adhesive labels with barcodes and alphanumeric text (including 'FBI - CENTRAL RECORDS CENTER', 'HQ - HEADQUARTERS', '62 - HQ-83894', and 'SECTION 4'), various red and black stamped text (including 'BUREAU', 'DESTROY of INVESTIGATION', 'COPIED FOR OIPA', and 'Transfer-Call 421'), and a handwritten FOIPA number.
